title: Witchpack
description: Witchpack is a witchery inspired data pack that adds features such as modular brewing, flying brooms, and ritual circles.
body:
Witchpack is a witchery inspired data pack that adds features such as modular brewing, flying brooms, and ritual circles. It requires a resource pack.
# Content
![A player is riding a broom above a ritual circle. There is a bubbling purple liquid filled cauldron behind him.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1df24405ec03bac14ed8d9382c82167ad2647c5.jpeg)
## Brewing
![A bubbling cauldron filled with a green liquid.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ceb5b419caeb5af8469d9f2f7e82b0c6f6a663e.jpeg)
32 Vanilla status effects can be placed onto potions using a custom brewing cauldron. Up to 3 effects, or 2 effects with one of a higher level, can be placed onto a single potion. Adding netherwart or mandrake root to the cauldron is required to add more effects or increase their strength. Potions can also be dyed.
## Circle magic
There are currently 16 ritual variants, 6 of which are curses, that can be cast using circle magic. Rituals can be used to teleport entities, summon lightning, or curse players.
### Curses
There are 6 curses. Curses do not go away on death and must be purged with a ritual.
- Curse of Slowness - Slows the player by 15% (Not a status effect)
- Curse of Weakness - Lowers the player's damage by 2 (Not a status effect)
- Curse of Frail Bones - Doubles fall damage taken and decreases the amount of safe blocks by 1.
- Curse of Fatigue - Cuts the player's mining speed in half
- Curse of Shrinking - Cuts the player's size in half. Their reach is reduced by 1.
- Curse of Enlarging - Doubles the player's size. Their reach is increased by 1.
## Magical Items
There is currently 1 magical item, the enchanted broom. Players can ride magic brooms to fly in the air.
## Custom Mobs
There is currently only 1 custom mob, the Mandrake. Mandrakes scream, damaging all nearby mobs. 1/100 Zombies will drop seeds to grow Mandrakes. Mandrakes drop mandrake roots, used for brewing and cleansing curses.
![A mandrake monster is above ground. A crop version and item version are next to it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2882b1a5e36cae12c92bc828a1a6d04f145f4176.jpeg)
# Guide books
There are 3 guide books that explain the modular brewing system and how to cast rituals and curses. The data pack recipes are automatically granted to the player in their recipe books.

![Recipes for the guide books. A book plus flint, an empty bottle, and an ominous bottle for rituals, brewing, and curses respectively.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28f1bd0020ceeb6fcd529b170d06b4abb862a29a.png)
